_comment_1: Claude Desktop MCP config for the ECP demo. Copy the contents of this file to:
_comment_4: After saving, fully quit and relaunch Claude Desktop (Cmd+Q, not just close the window).
_comment_5: Replace ABSOLUTE_PATH_TO_REPO with the real path to your enterprise-context-platform checkout,
_comment_7: Set ECP_BASE_URL to your ECP endpoint. Leave as http://127.0.0.1:8080 when running the stack locally;
_comment_8: change to your hosted URL (e.g. https://ecp.internal.example.com) when demoing against a shared instance.
_comment_9: Set ECP_API_KEY only if the ECP server has api_key configured. Leave empty otherwise.
